default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review calendar and discuss key priorities for the week ahead](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fundraising process to begin in January, with VC meetings packed into 2-3 days](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Focus on qualifying and prioritizing sales opportunities, with Bruno helping on coordination](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Hiring and recruiting remain critical priorities, especially finalizing the Chief of Staff role](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Calendar management needs refinement, including context-adding and color-coding for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

## Topics

### Sales Process Refinement

  - [Bruno (Marcel's brother) joining to help with sales coordination and qualification](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Aim to limit kickoffs to 2 per week, scheduling out to February](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Plan to create video demos for lower-value opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Need to improve blocking and tackling of opportunities, especially those from LinkedIn post (35 meetings, only \~20% seem legit)](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Fundraising Preparation

  - [Planning to run a 2-week fundraising process in January](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Will pack VC meetings into 2-3 days to create FOMO](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Team to tag VC-related meetings and flag any missed ones to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Marcel to decide on exact timing after discussing with Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Hiring and Recruiting

  - [Chief of Staff role needs to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Jane started today but contract issues need to be resolved](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Wiets to take over more from Molly in hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Richard (top candidate for Chief of Staff) just returned from honeymoon, priority to follow up](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

### Calendar Management

  - [Need to improve context-adding for meetings (e.g., LinkedIn profiles, company info)](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Color-code meetings and ensure notes are added](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Transfer meeting invites from Marcel to appropriate team members](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Prioritize rescheduling less critical meetings to next week](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

### Operational Tasks

  - [Marcel needs to set up new bank account for C-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=3260.0)
  - [Send list of assets and liabilities to lawyers](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=3254.0)
  - [Resolve contract issues with remote work platform](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to follow up on Matthew meeting confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Reschedule Alex (Savvy Calendar) meeting to Wednesday or Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Add context to various meetings (e.g., Smith.ai, Brett, Nick)](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
  - [Transfer meeting invites from Marcel to Kyle/Andre for client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Hold off on scheduling VC meetings until Marcel provides guidance](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Reach out to Abdullah and Smail for meeting coordination](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
  - [Team to surface daily to-do list for Marcel in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=3826.0)
  - [Continue adding notes and context to all meetings](https://fathom.video/share/-PD9ypdB94ubiH_67JwKuYL3aUNhM5hA?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
